human_actions_pending.context: Two Datsun rows: id 36758 (keep) and id 2863 (NHTSA duplicate, delete).

human_actions_pending.action: Run Estima SQL if not done
human_actions_pending.context: INSERT INTO public.vehicle_models (make_id, model_name, year_start, year_end, is_jdm_only, body_style, source) SELECT id, 'Estima', 1990, 2019, true, 'minivan', 'jdm_manual' FROM public.vehicle_makes WHERE make_name ILIKE 'Toyota' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

human_actions_pending.action: DB cleanup — remove Honda motorcycles, consolidate Silvia/Skyline
human_actions_pending.context: Honda models include motorcycles (CBR, CRF, etc.). Silvia S13/S14/S15 → Silvia; Skyline R32/R33/R34 → Skyline.

decisions.decision: CarReflection FL constants: FL_FX=0.13 FL_FY=1.1 FL_RX=0.93 FL_RY=0.82 FL_DEPTH=0.28
decisions.rationale: FL_FY>1.0 intentional — extends floor contact below image for front tire perspective. White-bg exclusion: r>235&&g>235&&b>235 treated as transparent.

decisions.decision: Soft delete via deleted_at (already in schema), 7-day recovery
decisions.rationale: Per architecture. Hard delete not needed.

decisions.decision: Stats (HP, torque etc.) belong in Snapshot, not Details
decisions.rationale: Details = ownership data. Snapshot = spec sheet. All spec columns already in schema.

decisions.decision: paint_code is the correct column name (not color_code)
Nickname shown blank in Details if it matches auto-generated default
decisions.rationale: Add Car auto-generates 'year make model' nickname if left blank. Details strips this so user knows they haven't set a real one.

decisions.decision: Date badge: black day square on home+garage, burgundy on carousel
decisions.rationale: Burgundy headers on home/garage — black day square avoids clash. Carousel black header so burgundy adds variety.

next_action: Build Snapshot screen at /garage/snapshot. Read-only spec sheet. Pull from cars table: engine_type, transmission, drivetrain, forced_induction, horsepower, torque, chassis_code, vin, license_plate, tire_size, oil_type, battery_model, is_import, year, make, model, trim. Dark GT aesthetic, consistent with existing screens. Route already in App.tsx.
